task_description:
设计一个健身记录网页应用的主页 PNG 设计图。包括：顶部导航栏（Logo+菜单+用户账户）、欢迎区域、今日统计卡片、本周运动趋势图表、快捷操作按钮。风格现代简洁，使用蓝绿配色方案。图片尺寸 1280x800 像素。保存到 ~/Desktop/

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.code:
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import math

# 创建画布 - 1280x800
img = Image.new('RGB', (1280, 800), color='#f8f9fa')
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# 配色方案
color_primary_blue = '#0066cc'      # 主蓝色
color_accent_green = '#00cc99'      # 强调绿色
color_light_gray = '#f0f2f5'        # 浅灰
color_text_dark = '#1a1a1a'         # 深灰文字
color_text_light = '#ffffff'        # 白色文字
color_stat_blue = '#e6f2ff'         # 浅蓝
color_stat_green = '#e6ffe6'        # 浅绿
color_stat_orange = '#fff0e6'       # 浅橙
color_stat_purple = '#f0e6ff'       # 浅紫

# ============ 1. 顶部导航栏 ============
draw.rectangle([0, 0, 1280, 70], fill=color_primary_blue)

# Logo 文字
try:
    font_large = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/PingFang.ttc", 26)
    font_medium = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/PingFang.ttc", 14)
    font_small = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/PingFang.ttc", 12)
except:
    font_large = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_medium = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_small = ImageFont.load_default()

draw.text((50, 18), "FitTrack", fill=color_text_light, font=font_large)

# 菜单项
menu_items = ["首页", "训练", "数据", "社区"]
menu_x = 400
for i, item in enumerate(menu_items):
    draw.text((menu_x + i*80, 23), item, fill=color_text_light, font=font_medium)

# 用户账户
draw.text((1100, 23), "👤 用户", fill=color_text_light, font=font_medium)

# ============ 2. 欢迎区域 ============
draw.rectangle([0, 70, 1280, 200], fill=color_accent_green)

# 欢迎文字
draw.text((60, 100), "欢迎回来！", fill=color_text_light, font=font_large)
draw.text((60, 140), "今天是美好运动的一天。让我们开始锻炼吧！", fill=color_text_light, font=font_small)

# ============ 3. 今日统计卡片 ============
card_data = [
    {"title": "卡路里", "value": "458", "unit": "kcal", "color": color_stat_orange, "icon": "🔥"},
    {"title": "步数", "value": "8,234", "unit": "步", "color": color_stat_blue, "icon": "👟"},
    {"title": "距离", "value": "5.2", "unit": "km", "color": color_stat_green, "icon": "📍"},
    {"title": "时长", "value": "42", "unit": "分钟", "color": color_stat_purple, "icon": "⏱️"},
]

card_width = 280
card_height = 100
card_y = 220
start_x = 50
card_spacing = 40

for i, card in enumerate(card_data):
    card_x = start_x + i * (card_width + card_spacing)
    # 卡片背景
    draw.rectangle(
        [card_x, card_y, card_x + card_width, card_y + card_height],
        fill=card["color"],
        outline=color_primary_blue,
        width=2
    )
    # 图标和标题
    draw.text((card_x + 20, card_y + 15), card["icon"] + " " + card["title"], fill=color_text_dark, font=font_small)
    # 数值
    draw.text((card_x + 20, card_y + 45), card["value"], fill=color_primary_blue, font=font_large)
    # 单位
    draw.text((card_x + 20, card_y + 70), card["unit"], fill=color_text_dark, font=font_small)

# ============ 4. 本周运动趋势图表 ============
chart_title_y = 350
draw.text((50, chart_title_y), "本周运动趋势", fill=color_text_dark, font=font_large)

# 柱状图数据（周一到周日）
weekdays = ["周一", "周二", "周三", "周四", "周五", "周六", "周日"]
values = [450, 520, 480, 650, 580, 720, 400]  # 运动时长（分钟）
max_value = 750

chart_x_start = 80
chart_y_base = 650
chart_width = 1100
chart_height = 250
bar_width = chart_width / 7 / 1.5  # 每个柱子的宽度
bar_spacing = (chart_width / 7 - bar_width) / 2  # 柱子之间的间距

# 绘制柱状图
for i, (day, value) in enumerate(zip(weekdays, values)):
    bar_x = chart_x_start + i * (chart_width / 7)
    bar_height = (value / max_value) * chart_height
    
    # 选择颜色
    if i % 2 == 0:
        bar_color = color_primary_blue
    else:
        bar_color = color_accent_green
    
    # 绘制柱子
    draw.rectangle(
        [bar_x + bar_spacing, chart_y_base - bar_height, bar_x + bar_spacing + bar_width, chart_y_base],
        fill=bar_color
    )
    
    # 绘制日期标签
    draw.text((bar_x + bar_spacing + bar_width/2 - 20, chart_y_base + 15), day, fill=color_text_dark, font=font_small)
    
    # 绘制数值标签
    draw.text((bar_x + bar_spacing + bar_width/2 - 15, chart_y_base - bar_height - 25), f"{value}分", fill=color_text_dark, font=font_small)

# ============ 5. 快捷操作按钮 ============
button_y = 720
button_height = 50

# 按钮1：开始运动
button1_x = 100
button1_width = 200
draw.rectangle(
    [button1_x, button_y, button1_x + button1_width, button_y + button_height],
    fill=color_accent_green
)
draw.text((button1_x + 35, button_y + 12), "▶️ 开始运动", fill=color_text_light, font=font_medium)

# 按钮2：查看报告
button2_x = 420
button2_width = 200
draw.rectangle(
    [button2_x, button_y, button2_x + button2_width, button_y + button_height],
    fill=color_primary_blue
)
draw.text((button2_x + 35, button_y + 12), "📊 查看报告", fill=color_text_light, font=font_medium)

# 按钮3：邀请好友
button3_x = 740
button3_width = 200
draw.rectangle(
    [button3_x, button_y, button3_x + button3_width, button_y + button_height],
    fill=color_accent_green,
    outline=color_primary_blue,
    width=2
)
draw.text((button3_x + 35, button_y + 12), "👥 邀请好友", fill=color_primary_blue, font=font_medium)

# ============ 保存图片 ============
img.save('/Users/lzz/Desktop/fitness_app_homepage.png')
print('✅ 设计图已生成：/Users/lzz/Desktop/fitness_app_homepage.png')
print('📐 尺寸：1280x800 像素')
print('🎨 配色：蓝绿配色方案')
print('📋 包含：导航栏、欢迎区域、今日统计、周趋势图表、快捷按钮')

action_checkpoints.reasoning: 作为 Designer Duck，使用 Python + Pillow 绘图库生成健身应用主页设计图。这样可以精准控制配色（蓝绿方案）、布局、字体和元素位置，完全满足设计需求。
